rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code residence homestead exemption amount. Elec. Code §253.151 governs applicability of political contribution rules to judicial offices. The two provisions are unrelated in subject matter and operation.
quote: This subchapter applies only to a political contribution or political expenditure in connection with the office of:
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption change and election code subchapter on judicial campaign finance.
